article_id: 1. A Judicial and Legal Services Commission is hereby established.

article_id: 1. A National Court of Justice is hereby established.
text_snippet: 2. The National Court is a superior court of record and accordingly, subject to any Act of the Parliament, has the power to punish the offence against itself commonly known as contempt of court.

article_id: 1. A National Executive Council is hereby established.
text_snippet: 2. The Council shall consist of all the Ministers (including the Prime Minister when he is present as Chairman). 3. The functions of the Council are- to be responsible, in accordance with this Constit

article_id: 1. A Public Services Commission is hereby established.

article_id: 1. A Salaries and Remuneration Commission is hereby established.

article_id: 1. A Supreme Court of Justice is hereby established.
text_snippet: 2. The Supreme Court is a superior court of record and accordingly, subject to any Act of the Parliament, has the power to punish the offence against itself commonly known as contempt of court.

1. Her Majesty the Queen- having been requested by the people of Papua New Guinea, through their Constituent Assembly, to become the Queen and Head of State of Papua New Guinea; and having graciously
The provisions of this Constitution referring to the Queen extend to Her Majesty's heirs and successors in the sovereignty of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland.
The Head of State takes precedence in rank over all other persons in Papua New Guinea and the Governor-General takes precedence in rank immediately after the Head of State.

article_id: 98. ACTS, ETC., OF THE HEAD OF STATE
text_snippet: Unless the contrary intention appears, any act by the Head of State takes effect when it is formally advised to the Prime Minister or the National Executive Council. PART VI. THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT D
